set-variable.name: authMasked
incomingJwt
mcpTokenAccessType
mcpCallerClientId

return-response.set-body: Access token must contain delegated scope 'mcp.access' (or legacy 'user_impersonation') or application role 'access_as_application'.
Caller application is not allowed to use this APIM retained MCP path.

set-header.name: X-User-Oid
X-User-Upn
